@All Pings @Governance Pings 

Star Atlas DAO - Vote on PIPs 3 and 4

The DAO has officially passed PIPs 1 and 2 with an insane 48% participation rate! Now it's time to vote on PIPs 3 and 4, which establish the Star Atlas council and create the Star Atlas Ecosystem Fund!

Discuss here: ⁠pip-voting

 | Vote until August 6: https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals
